record.field:
Odoo for Eyewear Stores

Managing an eyewear store requires seamless coordination between appointments, sales, inventory, and customer service. Odoo provides an integrated solution that simplifies these processes, ensuring efficiency, accuracy, and enhanced customer experience.

⚠️

If you want to easily discover every features of this package, try downloading the Demo Data.

You can still do it by upgrading your package in Apps.

Just be careful, once demo data are uploaded, it cannot be easily deleted. But you can restart a fresh database on Odoo.com/trial

Basics

📆 Eye Test Appointments

The Appointments module allows customers to book eye tests online or in-store, ensuring a structured workflow for opticians.

  • Schedule appointments based on staff or eye-test device availability.

  • Automated reminders reduce no-shows.

  • Link your appointments to opportunities, to easily create quotations, keep track of your potential customers, and more!

💡

Customize your appointments to obtain more information ahead of it, and personalize your email templates for a more personal touch. 

🧪 Log client data

Log your eye test data in the contact sheet of visitors. Just go to the contacts app, create a new contact, then add a client visit to the Consultations table to start entering a client's eye test results.

You can also share these results by creating a PDF using the "Print Results" button. 

🎯 Manage Opportunities in the CRM

The CRM application allow you to collect the requests from your potential customers by aggregating several sources:

  • Create an opportunity each time you faced a potential customer, receive a phone call, etc.
  • Redirect emails sent to the CRM mail address to the CRM .
  • Use the Website app to create a contact form that will redirect all the requests to the CRM .

Never miss nor forgot an opportunity. The CRM centralizes everything and allows you to ensure the follow-up of each request. If the request becomes concrete, create the customer in the Contact app.

🎓 CRM

💶 Point of sale

Manage customer purchases and returns. Access real-time sales data and inventory updates. Enhance customer satisfaction through loyalty programs and personalized offers.

💡

the Point of Sale app works on any device, as long as it has a browser.

🌐 Website & eCommerce

Create a professional website, design beautiful product pages, and process online orders seamlessly. Drive sales through marketing and SEO optimization.

🎓 Website tutorials  📖 Website documentation

🎓 eCommerce tutorials  📖 eCommerce documentation

💡

Add categories and tags to your products to make it easy to browse around your eCommerce

📦 Inventory management & Automated restocking

When making products available online, make sure you have enough stock. The confirmation of a quotation or a website sale can triggers the creation of a delivery order to your customer in the Inventory app. You can always see how much of each product you have available in the Inventory app menu, as well as on each individual product form.

🎓 Inventory

If the stock levels are too low, Odoo is capable of triggering a purchase order for the products to the right vendor, in the Purchase app. 

🎓 Purchase

✅

Tips for success

  • Set vendors and reordering rules for all your products in the Products menu of the Sales app or the Inventory app

  • Set-up coupons for returning customers to create a loyal customer base in the Sales app

  • Configure your ressources in the Appointments app to allow for multiple concurrent appointments if you have the capacity to do so. 

Do You Want to Go Further?

  • Manage your accounting easier than ever with a completely integrated environment. (Accounting App)
  • Manage all your communication channels in one place with Odoo Marketing Automation, Email Marketing, Social Media Marketing, and SMS Marketing.
  • Use the Dashboard app to keep an eye on your sales, purchases, and other important metrics. 
🚀

Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or go even further?

Reach us
